\tzpentry{ID4561}{Opera Omnia Vol Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4561 introduces Opera Omnia Vol Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Gamma = \omega_0 \exp\left(-\frac{2}{\hbar} \int_{x_1}^{x_2} \sqrt{2m(V(x)-E)}dx\right) \otimes \eta_{\text{rect}} \end{equation}
